name: Kongming

skills.name: Time for Tactics
skills.description: Active skill hits on enemies grant 1 stack. At the max of 5 stacks, he summons prisms to attack nearby enemies.

skills.name: Arcane Assault
skills.description: Fires 3 orbs in a fan-shaped area, dealing damage to enemies hit.

skills.name: Time Shift
skills.description: Shifts in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies near the start and end points.

skills.name: Winning Strategy
skills.description: Channels briefly and unleashes a spirit bomb at the target enemy, dealing lethal damage. lf the bomb defeats an enemy hero, the skill's cooldown is refreshed

tips: Kongming (Mage): Tier S on international ranked — 49.19% WR.
Build core: Hunting Knife, Boots of Tranquility, Guerrilla Machete.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 49.19%, pick 1.37%, ban 0.22%, popularity tier S.
Counters Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana · Weak into Allain, Biron, Wuyan.

faqs.question: Is Kongming good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kongming is Tier S Mage with 49.19% win rate, 1.37% pick rate, and 0.22% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Kongming build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Hunting Knife, Boots of Tranquility, Guerrilla Machete, Sage's Codex, Insatiable Tome, Boots of the Arcane. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Kongming?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Kongming: Allain, Biron, Wuyan. Kongming is strong into Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana. Countered by: Allain, Biron, Wuyan.
